Guide.title: User Guide
Guide.subtitle: Administrative Management System · Practice Pedagogical School, Tra Vinh University
Guide.intro: This document guides you through the main features of the Administrative Management System. For further assistance, please contact the IT Department or use the built-in AI Assistant.
Guide.s01Intro: Access the system using your official email and the password provided by the administrator. If you forget your password, contact the administrator for a reset.
Guide.s01i1: Enter your email and password on the login page.
Guide.s01i2: Click Login to access the system.
Guide.s01i3: Google account login is supported (if configured).
Guide.s02Intro: Go to My Profile to view and update your personal information, avatar, and digital signature.
Guide.s02i1: Update avatar: click on the current photo and select a new one.
Guide.s02i2: Change password: go to Account Settings → Change Password.
Guide.s02i3: Set up your digital signature in the Digital Signature section.
Guide.s03i1: Go to Leave Management → click Create Leave Request.
Guide.s03i2: Select leave type, start date, end date, and enter the reason.
Guide.s03i3: Click Submit to send the request to the approver.
Guide.s03i4: Track request status in the leave list (Pending / Approved / Rejected).
Guide.s04i1: Go to Work Order Management → click Create Work Order.
Guide.s04i2: Fill in the title, task details, assignee, and timeline.
Guide.s04i3: After creation, the work order will be in Pending Approval status.
Guide.s04i4: The principal or manager will approve and digitally sign it.
Guide.s05i1: Go to Device Reports → click Create Report.
Guide.s05i2: Select the faulty device, describe the issue, and attach a photo if available.
Guide.s05i3: The report will be forwarded to a technician for handling.
Guide.s05i4: Track repair progress in the device report list.
Guide.s06Intro: Click the robot icon in the bottom-right corner to open the AI Assistant. It supports both Vietnamese and English.
Guide.s06i1: Look up staff information, phone numbers, and colleague emails.
Guide.s06i2: Check leave schedules and remaining leave days.
Guide.s06i3: View the list of broken devices and repair status.
Guide.s06i5: Get navigation guidance to system features.
Guide.s07Intro: If you encounter technical issues or need further assistance, please contact the IT Department at Practice Pedagogical School, Tra Vinh University, or use the device report feature in the system.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.subtitle: Last updated: January 2026 · Administrative Management System
Terms.intro: Welcome to the Administrative Management System of Practice Pedagogical School – Tra Vinh University. By accessing and using this system, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions below.
Terms.s01Content: This system is exclusively for staff, teachers, and employees currently working at Practice Pedagogical School – Tra Vinh University. Any unauthorized access or misuse is strictly prohibited.
Terms.s02i1: Each user is responsible for keeping their login credentials secure.
Terms.s02i2: Sharing accounts with others is not permitted.
Terms.s02i3: If a compromised account is detected, the user must immediately notify the system administrator.
Terms.s03i1: Use the system only for tasks related to your assigned duties.
Terms.s03i2: Do not upload, share, or distribute false or illegal information.
Terms.s03i3: Do not interfere with, damage, or disrupt system operations.
Terms.s03i4: Respect the privacy and personal data of colleagues.
Terms.s04Content: The school reserves the right to temporarily lock or revoke access to any account that violates the terms of use without prior notice. The school commits to maintaining stable system operations and protecting user data in accordance with current regulations.
Terms.s05Content: The school is not liable for damages arising from user violations of the terms of use or technical incidents beyond its control.
Terms.s06Content: The school reserves the right to update the terms of use at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes. Continued use of the system after the terms are updated constitutes acceptance of those changes.
Terms.s07Content: For any questions about the terms of use, please contact the system administration team via internal email or directly at the IT Department – Practice Pedagogical School.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Last updated: January 2026 · Administrative Management System
Privacy.intro: Practice Pedagogical School – Tra Vinh University is committed to protecting the privacy and personal information of all users in the internal administrative management system.
Privacy.s01i1: Identity information: full name, staff ID, official email address.
Privacy.s01i2: Contact information: phone number, home address (if provided).
Privacy.s01i3: Activity data: login history, system actions, work logs.
Privacy.s01i4: Personnel records: qualifications, employment contracts, work history.
Privacy.s02i1: Managing personnel records and internal administrative tasks.
Privacy.s02i2: Processing leave requests, work orders, and device malfunction reports.
Privacy.s02i4: Statistics and reports for school management.
Privacy.s03Content: The system applies technical security measures including password encryption, JWT authentication, role-based access control (admin, manager, teacher, technician), and access logging. Only authorized personnel may view sensitive information.
Privacy.s04Content: Personal user information is not shared with third parties for any commercial purpose. Data is used only within the school, except when required by competent state authorities under applicable law.
Privacy.s05i1: Right to access and view your own personal information.
Privacy.s05i2: Right to request correction of inaccurate information.
Privacy.s05i3: Right to request account deletion upon leaving the school.
Privacy.s06Content: Data is stored on the school's internal servers. After staff resignation, data will be retained in accordance with the Ministry of Education and Training's record-keeping regulations.
Privacy.s07Content: For any questions about the privacy policy, please contact the IT Department – Practice Pedagogical School, Tra Vinh University.
